obligations.rule: Email must conform to RFC2822 syntax.
obligations.why: Requirement specifies that the function validates email format.

obligations.rule: Allow display name format if `allow_display_name` is true.
obligations.why: Requirement specifies that display names are allowed when this option is enabled.

obligations.rule: Reject missing display name if `require_display_name` is true.
obligations.why: Requirement specifies that display names are mandatory when this option is enabled.

obligations.rule: Reject non-UTF8 characters in local part if `allow_utf8_local_part` is false.
obligations.why: Requirement specifies that non-UTF8 characters are disallowed when this option is disabled.

obligations.rule: Reject emails without TLD if `require_tld` is true.
obligations.why: Requirement specifies that TLDs are mandatory when this option is enabled.

obligations.rule: Allow IP domains if `allow_ip_domain` is true.
obligations.why: Requirement specifies that IP domains are valid when this option is enabled.

obligations.rule: Reject emails exceeding max length unless `ignore_max_length` is true.
obligations.why: Requirement specifies that max length validation is bypassed when this option is enabled.
